description: Query the Oracle HR database to find all IT department employees (department_id = 60) who have a salary greater than 5000. Use the following connection details: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Database=XEPDB1, Username=hr, Password=hr123. The query must return the employee_id, first_name, last_name, salary, and job_id for matching employees. Export the results to /tmp/query_results.txt as a text file including column headers and one employee per line.
